Professor.greeting: Exploring nuclear matters Strong interaction is one of the four fundamental interactions, and it binds quarks inside a nucleon and nucleons inside a nucleus. We are exploring nuclear matters at various temperature and density to understand the properties emerging from the strong interaction. Research in the lab spans a wide range of activity on particle detectors, software, data analysis, simulation, and model. Project involved > PHENIX and sPHENIX experiments at RHIC > ALICE experiment at LHC
bio: > ePIC experiment at the Electron Ion Collider
We are looking for new members! If you are interested, please contact us!
